## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership opportunities around content strategy and SEO using AI](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel shared his AI-powered content workflow system for creating high-quality SEO content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Simply Put is an early-stage startup building an AI-powered data analytics product, looking to improve top-of-funnel marketing](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Marcel's approach focuses on building domain authority first before scaling content production for startups with low authority scores](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Potential opportunity to work together with Marcel providing dedicated resources and his content workflow system](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's AI Content Workflow System

  - [Onboards client, does competitor research, and builds customized AI content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Uses AI to generate outlines, do research, write drafts which are then reviewed/edited by humans](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Iterates and optimizes the prompts and inputs to improve output quality](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Dedicated person manages the end-to-end workflow for each client](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

### Simply Put's Business and Marketing Needs

  - [AI-powered data analytics product to allow users to self-serve data questions](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Early stage, looking to improve top-of-funnel marketing and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Current focus is marketing analytics, finance teams, and executive productivity use cases](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Low domain authority score, so Marcel recommends building authority before scaling content](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)

### Potential Partnership Discussion

  - [Marcel's 9k/month offering: Dedicated resource, customized workflows, strategy](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage Marcel's system to build out high-quality SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Discussion of different content topics/angles to explore (e.g. role-based data questions)](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Marcel also offers workshops to share his full approach](https://fathom.video/share/H2x1p4TJHN57qQLRX-F98trHxN4NxLpn?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Next Steps
